title: Taupo Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Taupo, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, to save up to 40% on your next family holiday in Taupo, New Zealand, with prices from $89/day and cover from $4.50/day
intro: Looking for a budget-friendly family holiday in Taupo? With its stunning natural beauty and range of activities, Taupo is an ideal destination for families. From free activities like visiting Huka Falls to discounted campervan hire and activity deals, we've got the inside scoop on how to save money on your next family trip to Taupo.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Taupo, including the popular Huka Jet and Wairakei Terraces & Thermal Pools. Additionally, Discover Cars has family campervans available from $89/day, and Booking.com is offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings. Cover-More is also providing comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day.

These deals can help you save money on your Taupo family holiday, but be sure to book in advance to get the best prices. For example, booking your campervan at least 3 months in advance can save you up to 20%.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities in Taupo
sections.body:
Taupo has a range of activities to suit all ages and budgets. Some of the best-value activities include visiting Huka Falls, which is free, and swimming at Lake Taupo, which is also free. The Wairakei Terraces & Thermal Pools are another popular attraction, with prices starting from $25 per person.

For thrill-seekers, Skydive Taupo offers an adrenaline-pumping experience from $299 per person, while Huka Jet provides a fun and exciting jet boat ride from $89 per person.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
To make the most of your family holiday in Taupo, here are some money-saving tips to keep in mind. Firstly, consider visiting during the off-season, when prices for accommodation and activities are generally lower. Secondly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices.

Additionally, look for package deals that include multiple activities or services, as these can often work out cheaper than booking each component separately. You can also save money by cooking your own meals instead of eating out, and by taking advantage of free activities like visiting Huka Falls and swimming at Lake Taupo.
list: Visit during the off-season to save up to 30% on accommodation and activities
Book in advance to get the best prices
Look for package deals to save up to 20% on activities and services
Cook your own meals to save up to $30 per day
Take advantage of free activities like visiting Huka Falls and swimming at Lake Taupo
Use coupons and discount codes to save up to 10% on activities and services

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices for your Taupo family holiday, it's a good idea to book your accommodation and activities well in advance. For example, booking your campervan at least 3 months in advance can save you up to 20%, while booking your activities at least 1 month in advance can save you up to 15%.

Additionally, consider booking during the off-season, when prices for accommodation and activities are generally lower. You can also use online travel agencies like Booking.com and Expedia to compare prices and find the best deals.
